title: Cryptography & Authentication
overview: Module 2 builds your cryptographic foundations. You'll understand how encryption protects data, how certificates establish trust, and how authentication systems verify identity—then fix a real certificate problem on a healthcare client's patient portal.

units_breakdown.labDesc: Symmetric vs asymmetric, hashing, key exchange. Hands-on with OpenSSL.
Certificates, PKI, MFA concepts. Certificate validation and chain of trust.
Client engagement. Fix expired certificate on patient portal + document.

clientContext.label: Client Context: Gulf Coast Healthcare Partners
clientContext.body: Patients are seeing browser security warnings when accessing the portal. Dr. Okonkwo is concerned about patient trust. Jennifer Walsh (CISO) needs the certificate issue diagnosed and fixed—with documentation for HIPAA compliance records.

footer: Start with Lab 2.1 in the Assignments section.
